summary: Completed full frontend testing of bieli.shop Next.js app. All 11 features tested. App is fully functional with minor observations noted.

minor.issue: Returns 0 items - falls back to MOCKED mock data (MOCK_PRODUCTS). This is known/expected per review_request.

ui_bugs.issue: Browser error badge '1 error' shown at bottom-left corner of cart page - likely browser extension or hydration warning. Needs investigation.
Product names/descriptions are in English (e.g. 'Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones', 'Premium wireless headphones...'). UI language is French but mock content is English.

issues: Overall design is clean, luxury minimal with black/gold palette. Playfair Display font renders correctly. No major contrast or spacing issues.

action_items: Consider translating mock product data to French for consistency with the French UI
Investigate the '1 error' browser error shown on cart page (may be hydration warning)
critical_code_review_comments: authStore.ts does NOT use Zustand persist middleware - relies on providers.tsx to rehydrate from localStorage on mount. This is fine but means there's a brief flash of 'Connexion' on page load before auth rehydrates.
Chat page is purely static/mocked - no real backend integration. Fine for MVP but should be noted.
Product catalog mock data is in English but the UI is French - minor inconsistency.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working: login (admin@test.com/123456), product page, add to cart, cart with BIELI10 coupon, chat, auth persistence/logout. Mock product data is in English. No critical bugs found.

test_results.homepage: PASS - hero section, 13 products (9 mock + extras visible), category sidebar, search, header with bieli. logo
test_results.login_page: PASS - split-screen layout, Google button, email/password form
test_results.login_flow: PASS - redirects to homepage, bieli_token stored in localStorage
test_results.auth_header: PASS - shows Déconnexion after login, cart icon visible
test_results.add_to_cart: PASS - cart badge appears, count increments
test_results.product_page_p1: PASS - price 89.99€, qty selector, add to cart btn, buy now btn, shows 'Ajouté !'
test_results.cart_with_items: PASS - items shown, quantity controls, coupon BIELI10 gives 10% discount (80.99€ total)
test_results.empty_cart: PASS - 'Votre panier est vide.' message with 'Voir la boutique' link
test_results.chat_page: PASS - 5 initial messages, send message, auto-reply working
test_results.auth_persistence: PASS - after reload, Déconnexion button still visible
test_results.logout: PASS - clears bieli_token from localStorage, redirects to /login
